title: Pan-Seared Schnitzel with Orange Salsa
description: A classic German dish featuring crispy pork schnitzel paired with a zesty orange salsa.
instructions: Season the pork cutlets with salt and black pepper.
Dip each cutlet in the beaten eggs and then coat with breadcrumbs.
Heat 1/4 cup of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the coated pork cutlets and sear for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the schnitzel to a baking sheet and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 12-15 minutes or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, combine the orange juice, grated orange peel, and minced garlic in a bowl.
Stir in the chopped fresh cilantro (if using).
Serve the pan-seared schnitzel with the orange salsa spooned over the top.
